text: Artificial intelligence, or AI, is the ability of computers and machines to perform tasks that usually require human intelligence. This includes learning, problem-solving, and decision-making. Machine learning is a key part of AI where computers learn from data without being explicitly programmed. Deep learning, a more advanced type of machine learning, uses artificial neural networks to process information in layers, similar to the human brain. AI is already common in daily life. For example, voice assistants like Siri or Alexa use it to understand speech, streaming services recommend shows based on your history, and self-driving cars navigate roads using AI technology.
